# Celestial Harmony
## Scripture
"For since the creation of the world God's invisible qualities—his eternal power and divine nature—have been clearly seen, being understood from what has been made, so that people are without excuse." - Romans 1:20

## Reflection
As we gaze up at the summer night sky, we're met with a breathtaking display of celestial harmony. The planets align, the stars shine bright, and the Milky Way stretches across the horizon. This beautiful tapestry is a testament to God's eternal power and divine nature. Just as the celestial bodies move in perfect harmony, our lives can reflect a similar rhythm when we surrender to God's sovereignty. The phases of the moon, the cycles of the seasons, and the movements of the planets all remind us that our lives are part of a larger, divine plan.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, as we marvel at the celestial harmony above, may we be reminded of your eternal power and divine nature. Help us to surrender to your sovereignty, that our lives may reflect the beauty and rhythm of your creation. May we move in harmony with your plan, trusting in your goodness and guidance. Thank you for the vastness of your creation, which declares your glory and majesty. May we worship you, the Creator of the universe, and may our lives be a reflection of your love and harmony. Amen.
